    The forum account is linked but hasn't been email-confirmed yet.

    activationBlocks() - Method in interface net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill.Skill
    Block types that trigger the active-ability coordinator when a player sneak-right-clicks them, regardless of the item held.
    activationMaterial() - Method in class net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.FishingSkill
    The item a player must hold for the ActiveAbilityCoordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures.
    activationMaterial() - Method in interface net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill.Skill
    The item material a player must be holding for the framework's active-ability coordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures.

    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.minecraft.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    A technical error occurred while communicating with the API.
    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.velocity.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    An internal technical error occurred while contacting the verification API.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.minecraft.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned a failure status but provided no specific error message.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.velocity.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API reported a failure but provided no specific error message.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.minecraft.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned 200 OK but the data payload was missing.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.velocity.verify.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API returned success but without the expected player data.

    TraceReport - Class in net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill
    Structured description of one skill-trace block, rendered uniformly by AbstractSkill.sendTrace(java.util.UUID, TraceReport) so every skill's trace shares the same layout: a header, the ability contribution lines, then zero or more labelled result lines.
    TraceReport.Result - Record Class in net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill
    A labelled result line shown beneath the ability contributions.
